title: 謎の島でトレジャーハント！

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A one and a two! One and a two! Warm-ups fully up warmed!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nothing better before a treasure hunt than warming up! Go on, you,
get to stretching!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A strange place, an even stranger Umamusume, and a treasure hunt...
I can't wrap my head around what's happening.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Really though, are you even listening? Hello? Hel-lo? Helloooo?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ring ring, ring ring. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Thank you for calling. This is Golshi's Ask Me Anything hotline.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Is your problem one of continental scale? Global scale? Or even
cosmic scale?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Customers calling with a question today will receive our grand double
conundrum prize! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, I'm offering cosmic solutions and all you think to ask about
is your measly little personal problem?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're hopeless. How's this? In the name of goodwill, I'll answer you
that one for free.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Listen up—we crossed the wild trails of the mountains beyond Tracen,
escaped the narrowest of caves, and made it through perilous jungles
to get here...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: In other words... we're somewhere on Earth.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh please, no need to panic! I don't really remember where, but it's
Earth, so we'll make it back someday!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I need you to focus. You do remember why we're here, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A reminder then—there's a priceless treasure waiting for us. Something that'll make me the undisputable, most powerful Umamusume ever.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We came all the way here to get it. And you're gonna help me find it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, let's start this treasure hunt! ♪ Cue the fanfare! You better tell
me as soon as you unearth the goods!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can grasp the situation, I'm forced into joining this treasure
hunt of hers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several hours later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohh! What's this old, beat-up canoe doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wowiiie! Check out those holes! A boat like this'll leak for sure! I bet
it'd sink us real fast!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And what do we have here... That's the stuff! Nothing says treasure
like moldy boots!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that sweet fishy aroma... Like a tuna troller of old... Really
takes me back to my days fishing on the open seas...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what the heck am I doing?! No time to wallow in nostalgic bliss!
Find that treasure already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been worked up like this since we got here. What exactly could
she be searching for?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? What're you looking at me for?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I think I know. ☆ You must've fallen head over heels for my
beauty. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I know it must be difficult... But you mustn't stare.
That—would—be—naughty. ☆
choice_data_list:
Um, actually, I wanted to ask what we're
looking for.

Um, actually, I wanted to ask what we're
looking for.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Don't you know treasure? Obvs it'll be all sparkly. Don't think. Feeeel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now I have even less of a clue... I guess I'll just start looking over
there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk over to some palm trees and notice a coconut that's fallen to
the ground.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For-ward! For-ward! Onward we go! ♪ Come on out, come on out,
tricky little treasure! ♪
choice_data_list: Uh, I found a coconut... How's that?
Uh, I found a coconut... How's that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa... WHOOOAAA!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's... the super healing fruit of the tropical realms! Are you
some kinda genius or what?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yah-hooo! ♪ That's the treasure I've been looking for! Careful now,
just lay it on the ground!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was a long shot, but I guess this is really what Gold Ship
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I place the coconut on the ground as instructed.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Now retreat to safety. What's about to happen is far too
dangerous for a mere mortal.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wataaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whack! Crack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She cracks open the rock-hard coconut with her bare hands! You need to be fearless and have tremendous strength to do that!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hehe, split it right down the middle.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now's about the time for a little break. Go ahead, take a seat,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With little else to do on this deserted beach, I accept my coconut half and sit down on some driftwood... To be continued
